This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] sub float16 1D constant tensors
  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test sub float16 actual 512 should be close enough to expected 122.6875 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 1 but got 2133
